payload.message: Paperclip onboarding: Accept this Brinc invite. Submit a join request to https://paperclip-production-83f5.up.railway.app/api/invites/pcp_invite_hfdp6i51/accept with your gateway token. Use adapterType openclaw_gateway, agentName Raphael, url wss://ggv-raphael.up.railway.app, scopes [operator.admin, operator.approvals, operator.pairing]. After submitting, reply with the request ID and claim secret so Molty can approve and claim.
